notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Agustín Ramírez reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by third baseman Eugenio Suárez. Xavier Edwards scores. Fielding error by third baseman Eugenio Suárez.

notableEvents.label: Dane Myers reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Dane Myers reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Otto Lopez.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Fielding error by second baseman Xavier Edwards on the pickoff attempt.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Liam Hicks reaches on a fielder's choice out, second baseman Matt McLain to third baseman Eugenio Suárez. Xavier Edwards out at home. Agustín Ramírez to 2nd. Throwing error by pitcher Jose Franco.

notableEvents.detail: Will Benson walks. Dane Myers to 2nd.
